'''âz-b-p-d''' ('''kazabpedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubricate|rubricate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-b-p-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubricate|rubricate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-b-p-d
|-
! Lemma
| kazabpedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizabpedoko|thizabpedoko]] || [[word:jizabpedoko|jizabpedoko]] || [[word:shizabpedoko|shizabpedoko]] || [[word:kizabpedoko|kizabpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzabpedoko|thuthuzabpedoko]] || [[word:jujuzabpedoko|jujuzabpedoko]] || [[word:shushuzabpedoko|shushuzabpedoko]] || [[word:kukuzabpedoko|kukuzabpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzabpedoko|thuzabpedoko]] || [[word:juzabpedoko|juzabpedoko]] || [[word:shuzabpedoko|shuzabpedoko]] || [[word:kuzabpedoko|kuzabpedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzabpedoko|thuzabpedoko]] || [[word:juzabpedoko|juzabpedoko]] || [[word:shuzabpedoko|shuzabpedoko]] || [[word:kuzabpedoko|kuzabpedoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozabpedoko|thothozabpedoko]] || [[word:jojozabpedoko|jojozabpedoko]] || [[word:shoshozabpedoko|shoshozabpedoko]] || [[word:kokozabpedoko|kokozabpedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozabpedoko|thozabpedoko]] || [[word:jozabpedoko|jozabpedoko]] || [[word:shozabpedoko|shozabpedoko]] || [[word:kozabpedoko|kozabpedoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozabpedoko|thozabpedoko]] || [[word:jozabpedoko|jozabpedoko]] || [[word:shozabpedoko|shozabpedoko]] || [[word:kozabpedoko|kozabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzabpedoko|thĂŠzabpedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzabpedoko|jĂŠzabpedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzabpedoko|shĂŠzabpedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzabpedoko|kĂŠzabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazabpedoko|thathazabpedoko]] || [[word:jajazabpedoko|jajazabpedoko]] || [[word:shashazabpedoko|shashazabpedoko]] || [[word:kakazabpedoko|kakazabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazabpedoko|thazabpedoko]] || [[word:jazabpedoko|jazabpedoko]] || [[word:shazabpedoko|shazabpedoko]] || [[word:kazabpedoko|kazabpedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazabpedoko|thazabpedoko]] || [[word:jazabpedoko|jazabpedoko]] || [[word:shazabpedoko|shazabpedoko]] || [[word:kazabpedoko|kazabpedoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
